title: A ChatGPT Exclusive: What is it? Why Was It Created? And How Can You Use It?
summary: Are you wondering what ChatGPT is, how it works, and why it's so popular? Well, who better to ask than ChatGPT itself?! In this candid interview, the software shares little about who it is, why it exists, whether it has any flaws, and what it thinks about the impact of AI on humanity. It even dips into a tale about a robot who fell in love with, errr, a human. Thought robot romance was dead? Think again. Just give the interview a read! Artykuł A ChatGPT Exclusive: What is it? Why Was It Created? And How Can You Use It? pochodzi z serwisu DLabs.AI .
author: Katarzyna Rojewska
